name: History page loads and displays scan history section
description: When a user navigates to the History page, the page renders without errors and shows either a list of past scans or an empty-state message indicating no scans have been recorded yet.

planSteps.description: The history page renders with a heading or title containing the word History or Scan History, without showing a crash or blank white screen
The page shows either a list of previous scan entries or an empty-state message — it does not show a JavaScript error or loading spinner that never resolves
